suppress.notes: WireMock 4.0.0-beta.38 embeds Swagger UI assets containing DOMPurify 3.1.4. The framework does not expose WireMock Swagger UI as a product-facing release surface; WireMock mock providers are framework-verification/local-CI substitution only. Re-evaluate when upgrading WireMock or before the next framework release.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.
Same WireMock embedded Swagger UI DOMPurify false-positive/risk-accepted asset boundary as above.

Dependency-Check maps WireMock's wiremock-httpclient-apache5 4.0.0-beta.38 artifact to an Apache HttpClient 4.0.0 CPE. The project also pins Apache HttpClient 5.6.2 directly. Re-evaluate when upgrading WireMock or before the next framework release.

commons-lang3 3.17.0 is used as a transitive utility dependency and is not exposed as a network-facing framework provider surface. Risk is accepted for v0.2.2 pending dependency BOM upgrade review before the next framework release.

jackson-databind 2.22.0 is used for framework result/evidence JSON handling. The framework does not enable default typing or untrusted polymorphic deserialization in the runtime paths covered by v0.2.2. Re-evaluate on Jackson BOM upgrade.

Dependency-Check maps WireMock's Apache5 HTTP client helper to old Apache HttpClient CPEs. The framework also pins HttpClient 5.x directly, and this WireMock helper is used only for local/CI mock-provider verification, not downstream product runtime.
WireMock gRPC extension is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.
WireMock gRPC extension is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.
WireMock gRPC extension core is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.
WireMock gRPC extension core is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.

WireMock gRPC extension Jetty helper is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.

WireMock gRPC extension Jetty helper is used only for framework-verification local/CI mock samples. It is not a downstream product runtime surface. Re-evaluate with the next WireMock gRPC extension upgrade.
